title: loganiaceae
intro: The Loganiaceae rank is a family of flowering plants. It is a taxonomic grouping that includes approximately 850 species of plants, commonly known as the loganin or loganiaceae family, which are native to tropical and subtropical regions around the world. The Loganiaceae family is characterized by its unique flowers and leaves, and is often found in woodland and forest ecosystems. Members of this family are known for their medicinal properties and are often used in traditional medicine.
